evals.prompt: У меня есть файл release-notes.md с заметками к релизу. Нужно создать страницу в Confluence в пространстве ENG под родительской страницей 445566, заголовок "Release 2026.15 Notes"
evals.expected_output: Should use `atl c create --space ENG --title "Release 2026.15 Notes" --body @release-notes.md --input-format markdown --parent 445566`. Must use --input-format markdown (not --body-format). Must use @file syntax for the body.

assertions.name: uses_atl_confluence_create
assertions.description: Uses the correct confluence create command with short alias

assertions.name: uses_input_format_markdown
assertions.description: Correctly uses --input-format (not --body-format) for markdown input

assertions.name: uses_at_file_syntax
assertions.description: Uses @file syntax for body input

assertions.name: sets_parent_page
assertions.description: Sets the parent page ID

evals.prompt: Напиши мне bash-скрипт, который находит все баги в проекте PLATFORM со статусом Open или In Progress, и для каждого выводит ключ и summary в формате KEY: Summary. Нужно чтобы работало в CI, токен будет в переменной JIRA_TOKEN
evals.expected_output: Should use ATL_API_TOKEN env var, -F json for machine-readable output, --jq for extraction, and proper JQL. Should handle pagination with --all. The script should set ATL_API_TOKEN=$JIRA_TOKEN.

assertions.name: sets_api_token_env
assertions.description: Uses ATL_API_TOKEN environment variable for CI authentication

assertions.name: maps_jira_token_to_atl_api_token
assertions.description: Maps provided JIRA_TOKEN into ATL_API_TOKEN for atl

assertions.name: uses_json_format
assertions.description: Uses JSON output format for machine parsing

assertions.name: uses_jql_status_filter
assertions.description: Filters by status in JQL or --status flag

assertions.name: uses_jq_or_template
assertions.description: Uses --jq or --template for structured output extraction

evals.prompt: Мне нужно перевести тикет BACKEND-456 в статус Done. Как это сделать через atl?
evals.expected_output: Should explain the two-step process: first get transition IDs with `atl j transitions BACKEND-456`, then use `atl j move BACKEND-456 --transition <ID>`. Must NOT suggest using a status name in --transition.

assertions.name: shows_transitions_first
assertions.description: First step: list available transitions to find the ID

assertions.name: uses_move_command
assertions.description: Uses the move command for transitioning

assertions.name: uses_transition_flag
assertions.description: Uses --transition flag with the move command

assertions.name: no_string_transition_value
assertions.description: Does NOT use a string name as transition value (must be numeric ID)

assertions.name: no_string_transition_quoted
assertions.description: Does NOT use a quoted string name as transition value

evals.prompt: Нужно получить все страницы из пространства DOCS в Confluence и экспортировать их в CSV с колонками ID и Title. Хочу потом открыть это в Excel.
evals.expected_output: Should use CQL search to find pages in the space, with -F csv output format. Something like: `atl -F csv c search "space = DOCS AND type = page" --all`

assertions.name: uses_csv_format
assertions.description: Uses CSV output format for Excel compatibility

assertions.name: uses_confluence_search_or_pagelist
assertions.description: Uses either CQL search or page-list to get pages

assertions.name: targets_docs_space
assertions.description: Filters by the DOCS space

assertions.name: projects_id_title_columns
assertions.description: Constrains output to ID and Title columns via --jq, --template, or --fields

evals.prompt: Нужно через atl api сделать POST запрос к Jira для создания нового фильтра с именем 'My Sprint Bugs' и JQL 'project = WEB AND type = Bug AND sprint in openSprints()'
evals.expected_output: Should use `atl api --service jira -X POST rest/api/2/filter` with --field or --raw-field for the body. Must include the correct endpoint and method.

assertions.name: uses_atl_api
assertions.description: Uses the generic REST passthrough command

assertions.name: targets_jira_service
assertions.description: Targets Jira service

assertions.name: uses_post_method
assertions.description: Uses POST HTTP method

assertions.name: correct_endpoint
assertions.description: Points to the correct Jira filter API endpoint

assertions.name: includes_filter_name
assertions.description: Includes the filter name in the request body

evals.prompt: Мне нужно обновить содержимое страницы 778899 в Confluence. Контент в файле updated-content.html в storage формате. Но я не знаю текущую версию страницы.
evals.expected_output: Should show a two-step approach: first get page info to find the current version with `atl c info 778899`, then use `atl c update 778899 --title ... --body @updated-content.html --version N`. Should explain that --version is required. Since the file is already in storage format, should NOT use --input-format markdown.

assertions.name: gets_version_first
assertions.description: First step: get page info to find current version number

assertions.name: uses_update_command
assertions.description: Uses confluence update command with the page ID

assertions.name: uses_at_file_for_body
assertions.description: Uses @file syntax for the body

assertions.name: includes_version_flag
assertions.description: Includes the required --version flag

assertions.name: no_markdown_input_format
assertions.description: Does NOT use --input-format markdown since the file is already in storage format

evals.prompt: Создай алиас 'mytickets' который будет искать все мои тикеты в Jira которые в работе. Потом покажи как его использовать.
evals.expected_output: Should use `atl alias set mytickets 'jira search "assignee = currentUser() AND status = \"In Progress\""'` and then show usage as `atl mytickets`.

assertions.name: uses_alias_set
assertions.description: Uses the alias set command

assertions.name: alias_name_mytickets
assertions.description: Creates alias with the requested name

assertions.name: includes_jira_search
assertions.description: Alias expansion includes jira search with currentUser()

assertions.name: shows_usage
assertions.description: Shows how to invoke the alias

evals.prompt: Напиши команду чтобы получить JSON со всеми комментариями к тикету INFRA-789 и отфильтровать только текст комментариев через jq
evals.expected_output: Should use `atl -F json j comments INFRA-789 --jq '.comments[].body'` or similar jq expression to extract comment bodies.

assertions.name: uses_json_format
assertions.description: Uses JSON output format

assertions.name: uses_comments_command
assertions.description: Uses the jira comments command with the correct issue key

assertions.name: uses_jq_flag
assertions.description: Uses the --jq flag for filtering
